Package org.areslib.sim

Class AresBatterySim

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.sim.AresBatterySim
public class AresBatterySim extends Object
Battery Simulation Model for ARESLib.

Computes estimated voltage sag during simulation based on the sum of current draw (Amps) across all active motors and mechanisms. Allows realistic simulation of brownout behavior and thermal limits.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static AresBatterySim getInstance()

    • resetTick

      public void resetTick()
      Resets the battery state for a new simulation tick.

    • addMotorLoad

      public double addMotorLoad(double appliedVolts, double velocityRadSec, double kV, double rMotor)
      Calculates the current draw of a DC motor given its applied voltage and back-EMF state, and accumulates it into the battery's total load.

      I = (V_applied - k_v * angular_velocity) / R_motor

      Parameters:
      appliedVolts - The voltage currently supplied to the motor.
      velocityRadSec - The physical velocity of the motor shaft.
      kV - The velocity constant of the motor (Volts per Radian/sec).
      rMotor - The internal electrical resistance of the motor coil (Ohms).
      Returns:
      The instantaneous current (Amps) drawn by the motor.

    • addDirectLoad

      public void addDirectLoad(double amps)
      Directly adds a known current draw to the battery load.
      Parameters:
      amps - Current to add.

    • update

      public void update()
      Computes the new battery voltage based on accumulated loads. V_loaded = V_nominal - (I_total * R_internal)

    • getLoadedVoltage

      public double getLoadedVoltage()
      Returns the dynamically sagged voltage available to the robot on this simulation tick.
      Returns:
      The dynamically sagged voltage available to the robot on this simulation tick.

    • getTotalCurrentDraw

      public double getTotalCurrentDraw()
      Returns the output total amperage drain for telemetry plotting.
      Returns:
      Output total amperage drain for telemetry plotting
